assumption_carrying_rule.conditional_sub_assumptions: included only for domains whose sub-verdict is SUFFICIENT or INSUFFICIENT
assumption_carrying_rule.not_evaluated_domain_assumptions: not included, but the domain remains visible in per_domain_breakdown
assumption_carrying_rule.isolation: PT-ISOLATION-01 required whenever isolation_sub is SUFFICIENT or INSUFFICIENT

precedence_rule.insufficient: one or more sub-verdicts is TRUST_INSUFFICIENT
precedence_rule.not_evaluated: no sub-verdict is TRUST_INSUFFICIENT and at least one is TRUST_NOT_EVALUATED
precedence_rule.mixed_precedence: TRUST_INSUFFICIENT dominates TRUST_NOT_EVALUATED in mixed rows
